summary: MasterClass-style Watch page redesign fully tested and working. All 13 features verified. Dark cinematic premium aesthetic implemented correctly with Playfair Display titles, DM Sans body text, hero auto-rotation every 8 seconds, horizontal carousels with Framer Motion animations, and responsive mobile design.

details: Hero background image loads correctly with cinematic overlay
Hero title in Playfair Display font (e.g., 'Teaches Faith in the Storm')
Instructor avatar and name displayed (Pastor David Rivera)
Subtitle and lesson/duration metadata shown
Start Watching button with play icon visible and clickable
Auto-rotates every 8 seconds between 3 featured items
Verified: 'Teaches Faith in the Storm' -> 'The Heart of Worship'
AnimatePresence provides smooth fade/scale transitions
3 navigation dots present at bottom of hero
Active dot has pill shape (32px width)
Clicking dots manually switches hero content
Button visible with play icon and text
White background, black text styling (MasterClass style)
Clickable and hoverable with scale animation
Category bar becomes sticky on scroll (position: sticky top: 0)
Gets .scrolled class with blur backdrop filter when scrolled
7 category pills with pill-shaped borders
Active state: white background, black text
Clicking changes active state correctly
Horizontal scroll on mobile with hidden scrollbar
Search icon button in category bar
Opens search bar with AnimatePresence animation
Search input with placeholder text
Close button (X) to dismiss search bar
4 carousel sections with title and 'Explore All' button
Smooth horizontal scroll with scroll-behavior: smooth
Navigation arrows (left/right) on desktop
Arrows hidden on mobile (touch scroll)
Deep Dives has gold accent title color
24 course cards total across all carousels
Card image with 16:10 aspect ratio
Instructor avatar (28px circle) with name
Card title in DM Sans 17px font
Duration badge (bottom-right with clock icon)
Badge labels (POPULAR, NEW, TRENDING, FEATURED) with colored backgrounds
Play overlay initially opacity: 0
On hover, overlay appears with opacity: 1
64px white circular play button centered
Card lifts up 8px on hover with framer motion
INSTRUCTOR SPOTLIGHT label in gold (#c9a962)
Pastor David Rivera name in Playfair Display
Bio paragraph with ministry experience
Stats: 12 Classes, 156 Lessons, 40h+ Content
Explore His Classes button with chevron icon
Title: 'Every Lesson. Every Teacher. All Access.'
Subtitle about faith journey
Gold 'Start Your Journey' button
Gradient background (dark blue/purple)
Header gets .portal-header-dark class on Watch page
Bottom nav gets .portal-bottom-nav-dark class
White text on dark backgrounds
Proper contrast maintained throughout
Bottom navigation visible on mobile
Hero content scales appropriately
Category pills scroll horizontally with overflow-x: auto
Carousel navigation arrows hidden (display: none at 768px)
Cards maintain proper sizing (flex: 0 0 260px on mobile)

seed_data_creation: No new data created - all content is hardcoded in PortalWatch.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: MasterClass-style Watch page is complete with all features working. Hero rotates through 3 items every 8 seconds. 24 course cards across 4 carousels (Popular, Trending, New Releases, Deep Dives). Instructor Spotlight highlights Pastor David Rivera. Dark mode applied to header and bottom nav when on /portal/watch route. All data is hardcoded (no API calls for Watch page content).

mocked_apis_note.note: All Watch page data is hardcoded in the frontend component - no APIs used

design_review.typography: Playfair Display for hero titles, DM Sans for body text - excellent hierarchy
design_review.color_scheme: Premium dark theme with black (#000), grays, white text, gold accent (#c9a962)
design_review.spacing: Generous padding (48px content padding, 72px carousel spacing)
design_review.contrast: High contrast maintained - white text on dark backgrounds readable
design_review.animations: Framer Motion for smooth transitions and hover effects
